title: ervum corsicum
intro: Ervum corsicum, also known as the Corsican clover, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ervum corsicum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Ervum corsicum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
